summary: IBM Quantum is a direct provider platform. Jobs run through Qiskit Runtime; results and backend properties are returned by the Runtime job and backend APIs.

fixture_to_public_schema.snapshot.status: Qiskit Runtime job status (QUEUED/RUNNING/DONE/ERROR/CANCELLED); mapped to canonical COMPLETED (DONE) here.
fixture_to_public_schema.snapshot.shots: Number of shots for the primitive run.
fixture_to_public_schema.result.measurement_counts: Bitstring counts from the primitive result data.
fixture_to_public_schema.result.compiled_circuit: ISA / transpiled circuit used for execution.
fixture_to_public_schema.device.calibration: Backend properties snapshot (qubit and gate calibration) from the backend API.

provenance_semantics.characterization_evidence: provider_supplied with nearest-available association (temporal delta reported; no claim snapshot in force during execution).
provenance_semantics.results_evidence: provider_supplied measurement_counts; execution timing derived from created/ended timestamps.
